scripts.dev:chrome: npm run build:chrome && ENTRY=content TARGET=chrome vite build --watch
scripts.dev:firefox: npm run build:firefox && ENTRY=content TARGET=firefox vite build --watch
scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.build:chrome: ENTRY=content TARGET=chrome vite build && ENTRY=page-script TARGET=chrome vite build
scripts.build:firefox: ENTRY=content TARGET=firefox vite build && ENTRY=page-script TARGET=firefox vite build
